description_long: This is a wooden chest of drawers with a curved, barrel-like lid and a rich, dark brown finish. The front features three prominent black metal handles, each shaped like a stylized cross, and a central lock mechanism with a metallic keyhole. The sides are plain, showing the continuation of the wood grain and the rounded top. The back is unadorned, with the same wood paneling as the rest of the chest. The overall construction suggests durability, with visible metal reinforcements and a sturdy build. This chest would be suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or sidewalks, serving as a secure storage unit.
description: A dark wooden chest of drawers with a curved lid, black metal handles, and a central lock, featuring a robust and secure design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three black metal handles and a central lock on the curved wooden lid.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the rounded top and plain wooden paneling, with a glimpse of the lock mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the unadorned wood grain and the back of the lock hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curved top and plain wood surface.
